75495.subject: We're adding new delight to your night! Night transport services were renewed on 1 July
75495.body:
![BudapestGO] (https://hirlevel.bkk.hu/link.php?M=66587800&N=285&L=25&F=T)

Dear Oleg Novosadov,
As of 1 July, nighttime public transport in Budapest and the greater
Budapest area has been reorganised. As a result of public and professional
consultations, we’ve created a network tailored to your needs that makes
nighttime travel more convenient for everyone. Discover the new night
transport network and plan your route with BudapestGO!
![Night public transport has been renewed]
(https://hirlevel.bkk.hu/link.php?M=66587800&N=285&L=144&F=T)
As the city changes, so do travel needs and habits. The last comprehensive
overhaul of the nighttime transport system took place more than twenty
years ago, so today’s network only partially reflects changing travel
habits and the evolution of the daytime transport system. Based on
professional and public consultations, we have redesigned the night
network; the new system went into effect on the night of 1 to 2 July.

Learn about the new network and the timetable: [bkk.hu/nighttransport]
(https://hirlevel.bkk.hu/link.php?M=66587800&N=285&L=145&F=T)

The new network:
•

more closely resembles the daytime network, so you can travel at night in
the same way you’re used to during the day;
•

takes you closer to your home, so you’ll have to walk less to the night
bus stops—including those in the Havanna, Káposztásmegyer and
Békásmegyer housing estates—and also connects new areas to the night
transport network, such as Kútvölgy and the Helikopter residential park;
•

provides more frequent and faster access at night to numerous locations
throughout the city and its metropolitan area;
•

provides new, direct connections from city centre to, among other places,
Soroksár, the western side of Rákosszentmihály, the
Nagytétény-kertváros, the Budafok-Budatétény and Rákospalota;
•

reduces unnecessary noise pollution through the use of environmentally
friendly nighttime trolleybuses and on-demand buses that operate only when
there is travel need;
•

as you’ve come to expect, the M2, M3, and M4 metro lines continue to
operate with extended hours, and the parallel night lines do not run along
the entire routes at weekends until 1:00 in the morning, but connect to the
metro network at the metro terminuses or at the outer metro stations.

Plan your trip conveniently with BudapestGO.

Thank you for choosing public transport even at night!

Best regards,

BKK Centre for Budapest Transport
This newsletter is sent to your email address registered in BudapestGO on
the basis of the legitimate interest of BKK as data controller. If you no
longer wish to receive messages related to the service, you can unsubscribe
by clicking [here]
(https://hirlevel.bkk.hu/link.php?M=66587800&N=285&L=72&F=T) . You can
check and change your notification settings [here]
(https://hirlevel.bkk.hu/link.php?M=66587800&N=285&L=71&F=T) .

For inform

75382.subject: Important updates to your MetaMask CL Card agreements
75382.body:
Important Update Regarding Your Card 
Dear Oleh

We’re reaching out to let you know about a small, behind-the-scenes update to 
the providers that support your MetaMask CL Card. First, the good news: there’s 
nothing you need to do. Your card and the way you use your account all stay 
exactly the same. We just believe you should always know who’s looking after 
your account. Here’s what’s changing, and why:

From 1 July 2026, the crypto-asset services in your account will be powered by 
MoonPay Europe B.V., a crypto-asset service provider authorized under the EU 
Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation (MiCA) by the Netherlands Authority for the 
Financial Markets (AFM). Your card and payments providers continue unchanged.

This change does not alter the terms of your agreement with us. The updated 
terms that apply to the crypto-asset services are MoonPay’sTerms of Use 
<https://www.moonpay.com/legal/terms_of_use_europe> and Privacy Policy 
<https://www.moonpay.com/legal/privacy_policy>.

We’re proud to keep powering your MetaMask CL Card.

Questions about this update, or anything else on your account? We’re always 
happy to help at metamask@cl-cards.com <mailto:support@cl-cards.com>.

Need a new card? You can order one in the app in a couple of taps, and don’t 
forget you can delegate and spend straight from your wallet.

Crypto-asset services are provided by MoonPay Europe B.V., authorized by the 
Netherlands Authority for the Financial Markets
(AFM) under Regulation (EU) 2023/1114 (MiCA). Card and payment services are 
provided by Monavate Ltd, The Officers Mess Business Centre, Royston Road, 
Duxford,Cambridge, England, CB22 4QH
Unsubscribe 
<https://links.cl-cards.com/s/u/SiQ5AD4WG0u6jZlbDv-szh-il9QkEQ71njmDn-dBiCUfN6hxuhb3aQxuoEfI_4dCx_SaHmZg7ZrymRTUDsQfQzJYmGJsICucyuDvBin9LDGcybkapoMmbeTeXCMf11u3MeAA1EK7aQ6BoHaZQv3BRz5n8kQlSQt9aZ6ndM0DQE9t0VKBIW7P_5ZpMv6n/uQhGfkvsprPzLWOPljn1rZz5zHOjmEC5/22>

75349.subject: Re: POZVÁNKA
75349.body:
Dobrý deň,

môžeme 12.30?

S pozdravom

---

Mgr. Michaela Bilá

Head manager Bukovina

+421908 849 791

www.bukovinakosice.sk [1]

Dňa 2026-07-01 18:49 Oleg Novosadov napísal(a):

> Dobry,
> 
> Dakujem pekne za pozvanku. Mohli by sme teda prist  08.07 o 12:00 ?
> 
> Dakujem
> 
> ср, 1 лип. 2026 р., 15:21 користувач BUKOVINA - MICHAELA BILÁ 
> <michaela.bila@bukovinakosice.sk> пише:
> 
>> Dobrý deň naši snúbenci,
>> 
>> rada by som Vás pozvala na osobné stretnutie pred Vašou svadobnou 
>> hostinou, ktorá sa bude konať u nás na Bukovine.
>> Rada by som s Vami prebrala detaily svadby, stretnutie, kde bude 
>> prítomná už aj moja koordinátorka spravidla trvá cca 1,5 hodinky, 
>> prosím pripravte si dostatočné časové okno.
>> Vedeli by ste nám dať časový nástrel stretnutia, aby sme spoločne 
>> našli prienik v kalendároch?
>> Sme na Bukovine viac menej denne od cca 8.00 do 16.30 hod.
>> 
>> Ďakujem!
>> S pozdravom
>> --
>> 
>> Mgr. Michaela Bilá
>> 
>> Head manager Bukovina
>> 
>> +421908 849 791
>> 
>> www.bukovinakosice.sk [1]


Links:
------
[1] http://www.bukovinakosice.sk
